Maximum Feed Intake Shares by Livestock Category

Source: R/data.R
max_intake_share.Rd

Maximum share of each feed item that can be allocated to each livestock category. Used by redistribute_feed() to cap feed distribution.

Format

A data frame with 28 rows and 3 columns:

Livestock_cat

Livestock category (e.g., Cattle_milk, Pigs, Poultry, Sheep, Goats)

item_cbs

Feed item name in CBS nomenclature

max_intake_share

Maximum intake share (0-1). Zero means the livestock category cannot consume this feed item.

Source

Livestock_coefs.xlsx, sheet "max_intake".
